channel.title: Disney Tips - bound.tips
channel.description: Daily Disney tips extracted from top YouTube channels

item.title: Meet Edna Mode in Toy Story Land at Hollywood Studios; she often has no line and her meet-and-gre...
item.description: Meet Edna Mode in Toy Story Land at Hollywood Studios; she often has no line and her meet-and-greet is a great experience. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Find a Merida pin featuring her brothers in the 'Animated Features' section of the pin trading bo...
item.description: Find a Merida pin featuring her brothers in the 'Animated Features' section of the pin trading boards at Hollywood Studios if you can't find specific Brave merchandise. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Visit Walt Disney Presents at Hollywood Studios to see exhibits about Walt Disney's life and earl...
item.description: Visit Walt Disney Presents at Hollywood Studios to see exhibits about Walt Disney's life and early animation, including references to Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Try the carrot cake whoopie pie at the Trolley Car Cafe (Starbucks) in Hollywood Studios; it's a ...
item.description: Try the carrot cake whoopie pie at the Trolley Car Cafe (Starbucks) in Hollywood Studios; it's a substantial and well-balanced dessert. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: If it rains at Hollywood Studios, most attractions will remain open except for Slinky Dog Dash, a...
item.description: If it rains at Hollywood Studios, most attractions will remain open except for Slinky Dog Dash, and indoor shows and shops offer good refuge. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Seek out Darkwing Duck merchandise in shops like Sunset Club Couture at Hollywood Studios, though...
item.description: Seek out Darkwing Duck merchandise in shops like Sunset Club Couture at Hollywood Studios, though it can be difficult to find. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Get a Colombian coffee blend at Joffrey's in Hollywood Studios, known for ethically sourced beans...
item.description: Get a Colombian coffee blend at Joffrey's in Hollywood Studios, known for ethically sourced beans, to honor the film Encanto. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Try the pepperoni spring rolls from the new snack cart across from Alien Swirling Saucers in Holl...
item.description: Try the pepperoni spring rolls from the new snack cart across from Alien Swirling Saucers in Hollywood Studios for a savory snack. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Ride Toy Story Mania at Hollywood Studios for a fun, interactive experience where you can compete...
item.description: Ride Toy Story Mania at Hollywood Studios for a fun, interactive experience where you can compete with friends and family by shooting targets in 3D. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Consider placing a small wager with friends or family when riding Toy Story Mania to make the gam...
item.description: Consider placing a small wager with friends or family when riding Toy Story Mania to make the game even more engaging. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Ride Alien Swirling Saucers at Hollywood Studios, a fun spinner attraction with a Toy Story theme...
item.description: Ride Alien Swirling Saucers at Hollywood Studios, a fun spinner attraction with a Toy Story theme that plays various songs from the franchise. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Enjoy the house-made chips with ranch seasoning and beer cheese dip at Baseline Tap House in Holl...
item.description: Enjoy the house-made chips with ranch seasoning and beer cheese dip at Baseline Tap House in Hollywood Studios for an underrated sharable snack. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Try a mixed beer drink at Baseline Tap House in Hollywood Studios, like the cider and wheat beer ...
item.description: Try a mixed beer drink at Baseline Tap House in Hollywood Studios, like the cider and wheat beer mix, for a refreshing beverage. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: If you are looking for Merida merchandise, consider purchasing the archer pin set at Hollywood St...
item.description: If you are looking for Merida merchandise, consider purchasing the archer pin set at Hollywood Studios. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Use the mobile check-in for Roundup Rodeo Barbecue if you have a reservation and ensure all party...
item.description: Use the mobile check-in for Roundup Rodeo Barbecue if you have a reservation and ensure all party members are present. (Source: ProvostParkPass)

item.title: Book dining reservations for Roundup Rodeo Barbecue well in advance, as they are highly recommend...
item.description: Book dining reservations for Roundup Rodeo Barbecue well in advance, as they are highly recommended and the restaurant fills up quickly. (Source: ProvostParkPass)

item.title: The Roundup Rodeo Barbecue is open for lunch and dinner, with seating beginning at 10:45 AM, and ...
item.description: The Roundup Rodeo Barbecue is open for lunch and dinner, with seating beginning at 10:45 AM, and is not a character dining experience. (Source: ProvostParkPass)

item.title: Consider the Roundup Rodeo Barbecue for a meal that can provide enough food to last for the rest ...
item.description: Consider the Roundup Rodeo Barbecue for a meal that can provide enough food to last for the rest of the day, making it a good value for filling up. (Source: ProvostParkPass)

item.title: Use mobile order for breakfast at Port Orleans Riverside food court for a quick and easy meal pic...
item.description: Use mobile order for breakfast at Port Orleans Riverside food court for a quick and easy meal pickup. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Grab a 'Cool Kids Summer Map' at Animal Kingdom for kid-friendly activities, food items, and anim...
item.description: Grab a 'Cool Kids Summer Map' at Animal Kingdom for kid-friendly activities, food items, and animal encounters. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Try the Bluey-themed treats at Pizzafari in Animal Kingdom, such as the Fairy Bread Cake and Wack...
item.description: Try the Bluey-themed treats at Pizzafari in Animal Kingdom, such as the Fairy Bread Cake and Wackadoo Fruit Freeze. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Check the resort's QR code for the activity schedule to find times for story time and character m...
item.description: Check the resort's QR code for the activity schedule to find times for story time and character meet-and-greets. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Character meet-and-greets, like Minnie's, can happen in the resort lobby in the morning around 8 ...
item.description: Character meet-and-greets, like Minnie's, can happen in the resort lobby in the morning around 8 AM and also in the afternoon. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Consider the food court options at Port Orleans Riverside for dinner, including chicken tenders, ...
item.description: Consider the food court options at Port Orleans Riverside for dinner, including chicken tenders, smothered beef, and gumbo. (Source: TheTimTracker)

item.title: Try the Mediterranean restaurant Amare at Swan Reserve for a high-quality, adult-friendly dining ...
item.description: Try the Mediterranean restaurant Amare at Swan Reserve for a high-quality, adult-friendly dining experience, even if reservations don't seem immediately necessary. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: Leverage the boat transportation from the Swan, Dolphin, and Swan Reserve hotels, which is shared...
item.description: Leverage the boat transportation from the Swan, Dolphin, and Swan Reserve hotels, which is shared with other Epcot resorts and provides a convenient option to Epcot and Hollywood Studios. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: Consider walking back from Hollywood Studios to the Swan, Dolphin, or Swan Reserve hotels at nigh...
item.description: Consider walking back from Hollywood Studios to the Swan, Dolphin, or Swan Reserve hotels at night as it can be faster than waiting for the boat or Skyliner. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: When traveling to Magic Kingdom from the Swan or Dolphin, take the bus from the Boardwalk resort ...
item.description: When traveling to Magic Kingdom from the Swan or Dolphin, take the bus from the Boardwalk resort instead of the Swan/Dolphin's bus which goes to the Transportation and Ticket Center. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: The Drury Hotel in Disney Springs offers significant value with a $0 resort fee, complimentary ni...
item.description: The Drury Hotel in Disney Springs offers significant value with a $0 resort fee, complimentary nightly happy hour with three drinks, a light dinner, afternoon snacks and popcorn, and a full hot breakfast including Mickey waffles. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: For families needing space, the DoubleTree Suites in Disney Springs is recommended as all rooms a...
item.description: For families needing space, the DoubleTree Suites in Disney Springs is recommended as all rooms are suites accommodating up to six people, with guaranteed connecting rooms available for larger groups. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: If proximity to Disney Springs is a priority, choose the Hilton or Wyndham hotels, as they are cl...
item.description: If proximity to Disney Springs is a priority, choose the Hilton or Wyndham hotels, as they are closest and have pedestrian bridges for easy access. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: The Hilton Palace hotel offers a lazy river, providing a resort-like amenity for guests looking f...
item.description: The Hilton Palace hotel offers a lazy river, providing a resort-like amenity for guests looking for pool-focused relaxation. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: The Wyndham hotel boasts the best pool area among the Disney Springs hotels, featuring multiple p...
item.description: The Wyndham hotel boasts the best pool area among the Disney Springs hotels, featuring multiple pools, a splash pad, and hot tubs, making it ideal for guests prioritizing swimming. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: For the most budget-friendly option among the Disney Springs hotels, consider the Holiday Inn.
item.description: For the most budget-friendly option among the Disney Springs hotels, consider the Holiday Inn. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: The Renaissance Hotel in Disney Springs is best suited for couples, offering an adult atmosphere ...
item.description: The Renaissance Hotel in Disney Springs is best suited for couples, offering an adult atmosphere with great cocktail spaces, a spa, and a DJ by the pool. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: Use Minnie Vans for transportation from Coronado Springs Resort, as they are more reliable than r...
item.description: Use Minnie Vans for transportation from Coronado Springs Resort, as they are more reliable than ride-shares in navigating the large resort grounds. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: Take advantage of the free admission to Typhoon Lagoon on your check-in day at a Disney resort.
item.description: Take advantage of the free admission to Typhoon Lagoon on your check-in day at a Disney resort. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: Use ride-share services to get to and from Typhoon Lagoon if it fits your budget, as it avoids th...
item.description: Use ride-share services to get to and from Typhoon Lagoon if it fits your budget, as it avoids the multi-step bus transfer process. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: Utilize the laundry services at Coronado Springs Resort, which allow you to track washing machine...
item.description: Utilize the laundry services at Coronado Springs Resort, which allow you to track washing machine times via a website and pay using your phone. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: Use a Lightning Lane for Big Thunder Mountain Railroad at Magic Kingdom to experience a significa...
item.description: Use a Lightning Lane for Big Thunder Mountain Railroad at Magic Kingdom to experience a significantly shorter wait time compared to the standby queue. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: Visit the new Jessie's Dance Party at Magic Kingdom's Diamond Horseshoe for an indoor, air-condit...
item.description: Visit the new Jessie's Dance Party at Magic Kingdom's Diamond Horseshoe for an indoor, air-conditioned activity where children can dance and play games, with seating available at the back for adults. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: The new 'Songs of America' show at Epcot's American Adventure pavilion is underwhelming and trans...
item.description: The new 'Songs of America' show at Epcot's American Adventure pavilion is underwhelming and transitions are weak; skip it if you are short on time. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: Attend the Goofy Party at Epcot's Communicore Hall for an indoor, air-conditioned experience with...
item.description: Attend the Goofy Party at Epcot's Communicore Hall for an indoor, air-conditioned experience with a DJ and games, similar to the Jessie's Dance Party at Magic Kingdom. (Source: WDWPrepSchool)

item.title: If not using early entry at Magic Kingdom, head to Liberty Square and Frontier Land to ride Big T...
item.description: If not using early entry at Magic Kingdom, head to Liberty Square and Frontier Land to ride Big Thunder Mountain and Tiana's Bayou Adventure before lines build. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Check the My Disney Experience app for the daily times of the Adventure Friends Cavalcade, as it ...
item.description: Check the My Disney Experience app for the daily times of the Adventure Friends Cavalcade, as it varies and is a great way to see characters like Raya and Marie. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: The Adventure Friends Cavalcade is a hidden gem in Magic Kingdom, offering a chance to see rarer ...
item.description: The Adventure Friends Cavalcade is a hidden gem in Magic Kingdom, offering a chance to see rarer characters and is often overlooked compared to other parades. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Prioritize drinking water and getting electrolytes throughout the day at Magic Kingdom, especiall...
item.description: Prioritize drinking water and getting electrolytes throughout the day at Magic Kingdom, especially during warmer months, to avoid dehydration and fatigue. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Consider riding attractions later in the day when crowds may thin out, especially for shows and g...
item.description: Consider riding attractions later in the day when crowds may thin out, especially for shows and game sessions within interactive areas. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Grab a 'Cool Kids Summer' map upon arrival at Magic Kingdom for a free, entertaining guide listin...
item.description: Grab a 'Cool Kids Summer' map upon arrival at Magic Kingdom for a free, entertaining guide listing kid-friendly food, attractions, and character locations. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: The Jessie's Round-Up interactive character experience at Magic Kingdom is highly engaging, with ...
item.description: The Jessie's Round-Up interactive character experience at Magic Kingdom is highly engaging, with kids wanting to spend over two hours there; manage expectations as it's a fun hangout rather than a traditional meet-and-greet. (Source: PixieDustedMom)
